import re
import numpy as np
from collections import Counter
from Levenshtein import ratio

# Constants
ALPHANUMERIC = re.compile('[\W_]+')

def task_func(text1, text2):
    # Clean and preprocess the texts
    cleaned_text1 = ALPHANUMERIC.sub(' ', text1).lower()
    cleaned_text2 = ALPHANUMERIC.sub(' ', text2).lower()

    # Tokenize the texts into lists of words
    tokens1 = cleaned_text1.split()
    tokens2 = cleaned_text2.split()

    # Calculate term frequency in each text
    tf1 = Counter(tokens1)
    tf2 = Counter(tokens2)

    # Compute cosine similarity
    tf_intersection = set(tf1.keys()) & set(tf2.keys())
    tf_union = set(tf1.keys()).union(set(tf2.keys()))
    vector1 = [tf[0] for tf in tf1.items() if tf[0] in tf_intersection]
    vector2 = [tf[0] for tf in tf2.items() if tf[0] in tf_intersection]
    mag_vector1 = np.sqrt(sum([x**2 for x in vector1]))
    mag_vector2 = np.sqrt(sum([x**2 for x in vector2]))
    cosine_similarity = np.dot(vector1, vector2) / (mag_vector1 * mag_vector2)

    # Compute Levenshtein ratio
    levenshtein_ratio = ratio(cleaned_text1, cleaned_text2)

    return tuple([cosine_similarity, levenshtein_ratio])
